query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS video_library (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  video_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  video_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  video_key VARCHAR(500),
  poster_url TEXT,
  duration VARCHAR(20),
  type ENUM('narrated','instrumental','social','vertical','presentation','recording','upload') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'upload',
  aspect_ratio VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '16:9',
  narrated_by VARCHAR(255),
  tags JSON,
  uploaded_by INT,
  uploaded_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('draft','processing','published','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published',
  view_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  download_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
